282:363.characters: My first experience in the highly creative and fast-paced field of Crypto. After 6 months working as a Design Team Lead with a team of 4, I took on the role. I launched the Kibble Clicker mini-game on the TON Network (a 2024 trend), attracting over 700,000 users within a week of its launch. The Kibble Exchange project raised over $5 million in VC funding. In addition to my UI/UX/Product design experience, I also collaborated with the Marketing team to design banners for marketing campaigns.

272:437.name: A bold headline that grabs attention.
272:437.characters:
UI/UX & Product Designer | Design Team Leader With almost 5 years of experience in UI/UX and Product Design, I have successfully contributed to and led 30+ projects across diverse industries, including IoT, real estate, Web3, and education. Notably, my work in Web3 has resulted in products attracting over 700,000 users within just one week, showcasing my ability to design impactful and user-centered digital experiences.  I/ Key Experience and Skills:
UI/UX Leadership: Nearly 2 years of experience in a leadership role, guiding design teams with 3 members, defining design strategies, and collaborating closely with stakeholders to deliver innovative solutions.
Diverse Skill Set: Expertise in UI/UX Design, complemented by strong capabilities in graphic design, social media banners, and video production for marketing and branding initiatives.
International Collaboration: Proven track record of working with international clients and cross-functional teams from Singapore, South Korea, and the EU, adapting to diverse cultural perspectives and design standards. 
II/ Design Philosophy:
I believe that exceptional design goes beyond aesthetics-it’s about creating intuitive, efficient, and impactful experiences. 
My approach is grounded in user research, data analysis, and iterative testing to craft solutions that are not only visually appealing but also drive tangible business outcomes.
___
I’m always open to exploring new challenges, expanding my skills, and contributing to innovative projects that make a difference. Feel free to connect-I’d love to discuss ideas and collaborate!

siteSettings.title: Danny_xs
siteSettings.description:
🚀 UI/UX & Product Designer | Design Team Leader
With over 4 years of experience in UI/UX and Product Design, I have successfully contributed to and led 30+ projects across diverse industries, including IoT, real estate, Web3, and education. Notably, my work in Web3 has resulted in products attracting over 700,000 users within just one week, showcasing my ability to design impactful and user-centered digital experiences.
